channel.title: The Mind Vault
channel.generator: Webpage HTML Export plugin for Obsidian

item.title: Index
item.description: Index stuff

item.title: Ari Lorano
item.description:
Age: 17 (3341 AE, born 3324 AE)Born as part of the Proteus Project on Sovara, Ari was genetically modified with regenerative traits derived from the Zova. Following a catastrophic containment breach at the facility he was created, Ari's family fled to Vost. A few years later, after the Theta Virus was released, his parents were killed by an infected droid. Ari spent his next few years scavenging for survival within the ranks of the Vost Scrapper Guild. His experiences honed his skills in mechanical repair and combat, alongside a fierce loyalty to his friends Kairu Akuna and Domelo Marcell. Despite a troubled past, Ari possesses a quick wit, resourcefulness, and courage that drive him to protect others.
Infobox Biographical Information Character Information Physical Description Relationship Information Affiliations
Vost Scrapper Guild
Proteus Project
Ari was born on Sovara in 3324 AE. His parents were scientists affiliated with the Proteus Project and conducted genetic research alongside Bora Sovech and Soya Sovech. Born as part of an experimental programme for the Proteus Project, Ari was genetically modified with regenerative traits derived from the Zova, an apex predator species native to Sovara. He spent his early childhood on Sovara, where he grew up alongside Lila Sovech, the daughter of his parents' work partners who was also genetically modified as part of the Proteus Project. During this period, the pair were frequently cared for by Lila's grandmother while their parents were working.
In 3327 AE, when Ari was three years old, a containment breach involving a pair of Zova resulted in the destruction of the research laboratory. Following the incident, Ari’s family fled Sovara and relocated to Vost. Later that year, Ari’s mother gave birth to his younger brother, Leo Lorano.
In 3329 AE, the Theta Virus outbreak began, leading to widespread droid infections. In 3330 AE, when Ari was six years old, his parents were killed by an infected droid on Vost. Ari and his two-year-old brother were subsequently taken into the care of their uncle, Brax Irvan. Brax was a member of the newly founded Vost Militia, an organisation formed to eliminate infected droids on the planet.
After the Vost Militia had cleared the majority of infected droids, Vost's population was left in widespread poverty. The Militia established camps for orphaned children and assigned them to scavenging work throughout the cities. These camps later became known as the Vost Scrapper Guild. Ari grew up within the Guild, operating out of the the Krav Division led by his uncle Brax Irvan in the sprawling city of Krav. He worked as a scavenger and developed skills in mechanical repair. As the nephew of Brax, Ari was regarded as his personal favourite and was often rewarded more than other scrappers. His brother Leo later joined the Guild when he was old enough. During this period, Ari met and formed strong relationships with fellow scrappers Kairu Akuna and Domelo Marcell.At first Ari was relatively contempt with life in the Scrapper guild, but he later grew a strong desire to become a pilot and explore the galaxy. He would often traverse the abandoned shipyard, breaking into inoperative starships and playing with the controls.
In 3341, a month after Ari turned seventeen years old, Ari discovered that his uncle Brax was planning on giving him to Proteus in exchange for a large amount of money. Ari decided to escape the Guild with his friends Kairu and Domelo. Upon discovering his escape, Brax sent Lila Sovech to locate Ari and return him alive. She was instructed not to pursue the other two escaped scrappers, though she was authorised to eliminate them if they interfered. Ari was caught and brought back to the Krav Division Tower where they confronted Brax and Proteus. However when Lila discovered that Brax double crossed her and was planning on handing her over to Proteus, she assisted Ari in his escape from the building. Joined by Kairu and Domelo, Ari and Lila fled the city. dada adad a da da d ad ad a da da d ad ad a da da da da da da da dad aRegenerative Healing: Ari possesses accelerated healing abilities, allowing him to recover from injuries much faster than a normal human. He can also channel this power to calm or heal others through physical contact, however the effect is limited and can be taxing.
Scavenging Expertise: Due to his time on Vost as a scavenger for the Vost Scrapper Guild, Ari is skilled in scavenging, repair, and improvised combat. Mechanical Aptitude: Experienced with machinery and vehicles, including assembling and modifying them.🔗︎ Lila🔗︎ Kai

item.title: TEST
item.description: 🔗︎ Lila🔗︎ Kai

item.title: Hana Otharia
item.description:
Age: 21 (3342)Infobox Biographical Information Character Information Physical Description Relationship Information Affiliations
Dawn
Dawn Alpha-Crew
Omega Tech
Hana was born and raised on Acropolis. She was born into a rich family, with her father, Kuda Torenai, being the CEO of Omega Tech.She had been artistic since a child.Her father sent her to boarding school, she didn't like school. She would skip classes and sneak out at night.She had a hideout on the top of an abandoned building in the outskirts of the city that she would take the bus to each night. When Hana was 16 she met Rex and Scout in an abandoned train tunnel as she was spray painting and they were on the run from authorities. They convinced her to help them and she took them to her hideout? Idk one thing lead to another, she learnt about them and their mission and wanted to go with them.Idk how to make it make sense that her parents never got worried, or gets worried that they haven't heard from her in ages.I want rex to get a dent from the brick Hana throws but how does he not have dents from anything else, actually he has loads of dents from over the years, each dent tells a story. Hana's dent is on the bottom left of his eye ring thing and its very recognizable. But then how come he isnt a conplete wreck from getting beat up so much, surely he has to replace parts every now and then?When Hana was 16, she was in her hideout one night... Actually no she was sneaking around the city.Police searchlight ship things like helicopter but sci-fi lit up the sky, they seemed to be searching for someone in the area.She slipped down alleyways and stuff People mention how there are droids about and its reccomended to stay home.Later Hana was in an abandoned train tunnel, spray painting."I knew it was a bad idea coming here." A voice echoed from down the tunnel. "Hey, it was worth a shot. As long as we don't get caught we'll be fine." A deeper voice said. Hana heard footsteps coming closer. "Wait, I'm picking up a heat sig from further down." The higher voice said. "Probably just some homeless dude, we'll be fine." The voices sounded digital. Could these be the droids the police are looking for? Hana thought. She armed herself with a brick from the rubble. Out of the shadows appeared a tall, slender droid with a large-rimmed hat. A smaller drone-like one flew up behind. The tall one looked at Hana then turned to it's companion, surprised. "Its a gir-" The droid was cut off as Hana's brick smashed into the side of it's head, knocking it back. "Hey that hurt!" "You felt that?" Hana asked, bewildered. "No it hurt my feelings." The tall droid said with a sarcastic tone taking a step further. Hana grabbed another brick. "Don't come any closer." "Look we dont want any trouble. We won't hurt you." said the flying one. "What are you doing down here?" Hana asked. "I could ask you the same thing." The tall one said. "Answer my question." "Sigh, kids these days, so many questions." "Did you just say the word sigh?" "Well I can't actually sigh, so..." They stood in silence for a few seconds then the droid spoke again. "Let's start again. My name's Rex, and this is Scout." He pointed to his buddy. "Where on the run from the police, does this tunnel lead out of the city perchance?" "Why would I help you?" "I don't know. When they catch us should I let them know you were down here vandalizing. You don know that's illegal right?" "That's a lot coming from terrorists. " "Terrorists? That's what they're calling us? That's a lot coming from a government that massacred millions of droids."The terrorist thing doesnt make sense at this point in the timeline.

item.title: TPP timeline
item.description: Months are accurate to Earth months not whatever month system I come up with in the future.28 may 2026 idea: (not actually, just when im writing it down)Basically they go to some other lab thing with magic stuff and lila gets the ability to tranform between human and avian forms. No fucking idea how to make this work.Maybe its just Lila who goes. Or no they need Ari for studying. Idk maybe they used the info from the prev time. Idk I had an idea where Ari and Lila get separated. Then Lila escapes and finds her way to Ari. There's also a problem with people coming to her planet to mine the magicy stuff or something. She flies in and lands in front of ari and falls into him hugging him. Ari freaks out because she has human arms. Lila explains everything and they wanna find a way to help her planet.Also maybe Ari's living with his cousin (and his grandma) or something. He knew her from when he was a kid and when they meet she hugs him making her bf concerned.

item.title: Kairu Akuna
item.description:
Age: 19 (3341)Infobox Biographical Information Character Information Physical Description Relationship Information Affiliations
Vost Scrapper Guild
Inspired by the character Kiruko from Heavenly Delusion. Kairu's relationship with Dom is also inspired slightly Kiruko's relationship with the character Maru.Tomboyish character22-05-26 Idea, she loses an arm and gets a prosthetic.3324 ari. 17. 18. 193321 hana. 20. 21. 223322 kai. 19. 20. 21Idk, but she ended up a scrapper. Orphan or smth.

item.title: Gerrick Thorbes
item.description:
Infobox Biographical Information Character Information Physical Description Relationship Information Affiliations
Gerrick Thorbes was a farmer and hunter on the planet Demeter. His wife and daughter were killed in an infected droid attack.

item.title: Lila Sovech
item.description:
Infobox Biographical Information Character Information Physical Description Relationship Information Affiliations
Proteus Project
Lila was born on Sovara in 3324 AE. Her parents, Bora and Soya Sovech, were scientists affiliated with the Proteus Project and conducted genetic research alongside Dad Lorano and Mirela Lorano. Born as part of an experimental programme for the Proteus Project, Lila was genetically modified with colour changing traits derived from the Zova, an apex predator species native to Sovara. She spent her early childhood on Sovara, where she grew up alongside Ari Lorano, the son of her parents' work partners who was also genetically modified as part of the Proteus Project. During this period, the pair were frequently cared for by her grandmother while their parents were working.
In 3327 AE, when Lila was three years old, a containment breach involving a pair of Zova resulted in the destruction of the research laboratory and the death of her parents. Following the incident, Ari’s family fled Sovara, leaving Lila alone with her grandmother.Lila's village, who already didn't trust humans, blamed the humans for the containment breach, and Lila grew to despise all humans. As Lila grew older she was taught to hunt, a major part of the Sovari culture.In 3341, a month after Ari turned seventeen years old, Ari discovered that his uncle Brax Combat Style Ambush Stealth Precision Melee Close-quarters Ranged Weapons Dual injector knives Throwing knives Silenced pistol Sniper rifleCybernetic Arm Features Grapple wire Dart launcher Retractable wrist bladesDart Types EMP dart Tracker dart Injector dart Gas dart Taser dartTools Smoke capsules Gas/mist cartridges Micro drone

item.title: Human
item.description: Like, its a human...

item.title: Galactic Centre
item.description: Centre of the galaxy.

item.title: Astraeus
item.description: Galaxy :)

item.title: Omega Aurora
item.description: Focuses on Hana.

item.title: Nisoka
item.description: Mountains, forests, and seas. Asia inspired, specifically Japan.

item.title: _Chapters
item.description:
Act 1Act 2ChaptersDom and Kai run after Lila and confront her at her ship. She gets away but Dom manages to put a tracker on her ship. They follow her in the car they stole. POV SWITCH to Ari. Ari is in a cell in Lila's ship, he's sleepy from the sedative Lila gave him. He uses his healing powers to mostly heal the scars on his back from his fight with Lila. Our first look at his powers in use. Lila barges in and cuffs him. He is taken to Brax and it ends with Brax saying smth like. "Ari, welcome home."7 - Prisoner (Dom→Ari)
ChaptersLila is searching for Brax. Maybe she's in the middle of a bounty job, or she has just finished one. She talks with a guy who gives her info about Brax.3 - Huntress (Lila)
ChaptersAri and his friends steal a speeder/car and escape the city. They reach another city in the evening and find a place to camp. Dom and Kai plan to scavenge in the morning.4 - Escape (Ari)
ChaptersThey escape together in Ari's car, he thought it had been destroyed long ago when Brax found out about it but Brax actually kept it around. Car chase scene with the agency on their tail. They manage to escape together.10 - Chase (Ari)
Chapters Dom and Kai track Lila's ship to the building they are in. They notice other ships pulling up from the scientific agency. POV SWITCH to Ari. Lila gets her reward, a holo-video of her parents. The agency shows up. Lila realises she had been set up.8 - Setup (Dom→Ari)
ChaptersAs they are being escorted away, Ari jumps into the shaft with Lila. The agency fire after them and Lila gets hit. Agency boss orders cease fire because they are being too reckless, preventing fatal shots. Storage closet scene with wound - intimate. (some kinda thing where Ari heals Lila's side and her feathers are soft or smth "Feathers. Ari didn't know what he was expecting. They were short and soft, almost like fur") Dom and Kai barge in."Who are the fancy guys?"9 - The Agency (Ari)
ChaptersAri wakes up, and Dom and Kai are already gone. When he's alone he gets attacked and captured by Lila. Quick POV switch to Dom. They are heading back to Ari and see Lila leaving with him. ^ Dom POV could be its own chapter with the start of chapter 76 - Attack (Ari→Dom)
ChaptersAri and his friends make a plan to escape together. Ari asks his younger brother, Leo, if he wants to come along but Leo refuses, saying he likes his life as a scrapper for Brax. Shows family dynamics and stuff.2 - Family (Ari)
ChaptersAri, Dom and Kai have an encounter with an infected droid while out scavenging. This sets up character dynamics before giving us the inciting incident. They get back to the camp and overhears Brax talking about his deal with the agency - the inciting incident.I remember this I think‌“Are you sure about this?” Domelo asked, adjusting his glasses as he stared at a bright red danger sign that hung from a chained-up mesh gate. It depicted a robotic figure standing in a pool of blood and bones.“Well… Jemi said it’s rare for droids to visit this area,” Ari said through the fence as he dropped to the ground on the other side, “so blame him if everything goes wrong.” He dusted his hands off. “Plus, we have Kai.”“That’s not reassuring,” Dom said.“Wow, thanks,” Kairu said sarcastically from the top of the fence.“No, not you, I mean we’re just going off something Jemi said? Of all people we’re trusting Jemi on this one?”Ari sighed. “The safe zone is basically empty at this point. Out here is a gold mine and we need to take advantage of it before everyone else beats us to it.” Ari reached to up help Kai.“Come on Dom, lets just get this over with. I don’t like this idea as much as you do, but when has Ari ever failed us?” Kai said as she planted her feet on the ground. “Well I have a list,” Dom said, “but it’s not Ari I’m worried about, its Jemi. How would Jemi of all people know this area’s safe?”“No idea, but let’s get a move on. The longer we hang around here the riskier it is.” Kai said.Dom clambered over the fence, less graceful than the two before him.1 - Droid (Ari)
Chapters(Could potentially be squeezed in at the end of chapter 4)Lila arrives at Brax’s and Brax offers her the job to find Ari. Short POV of Brax at the end:The the scientific agency arrives early. They find out about Lila and Brax realises he can earn double the money by handing in Lila as well.5 - Deal (Lila→Brax)
ChaptersAri wakes up in the middle of the night. Lila is gone. He finds her by the river watching the video of her parents. He approaches her and she is startled, shutting off the video. Ari asks who the people were and Lila shows him and explains what she knows about them. She also tells Ari about her abilities. Ari realises he might be from a similar experiment, he doesn't tell her about his healing powers just yet though, he doesn't mention it to Lila, he just thinks about it internally. She shows him her glowing ability and Ari is amazed. They sit in silence for a bit. At some point either here or earlier Ari throws a couple rocks into the water. Ari eventually falls asleep.11 - Parents (Ari)
ChaptersAri has a dream about the lab when he was little. Ari wakes up and Lila is gone again. He's cold and goes back to the car. Lila isn't there either. The others are sound asleep by the fire. I like the idea of describing both Kai and Dom as they sleep or smth. Like how Kai is strong and brute but looks so innocent when she sleeps or something, and Dom is drooling or smth. Ari sits down by the fire and tries to fall asleep but he cant. He cant stop thinking about how he could be linked to Lila and what the agency wants with them both. He heads back to the river, standing up on a bank and looks across it into the forest. Then suddenly he hears a faint scream come from inside the forest. He stumbles down the bank and wades through the water, running into the forest in the direction he thinks the scream came from. He rushes through the forest and hears more screams getting louder. He trips on a root and blacks out.Another dream sequence of him as a toddler. He is trying to sleep in his bedroom but he can hear another kid crying and screaming from down the hall, echoing around the clinical interior.He wakes up with a headache, his head is spinning. But he can still hear crying and screaming. He gets up, he can see light flashing from between the trees. He rushes to the source. Lila is in a clearing rolling around on the ground, flying around, crashing into trees, screaming and crying in pain. Ari rushes to her and restrains her. She flings him off of her with immense strength and he rolls across the ground. He gets up and she's squatting on the ground with her head in her hands, crying. Ari gets up and rushes back to her asking what's wrong. She screams out "It' hurts." She pulls at her hair. She digs at the ground with her feet. Then she lets out another scream, spreading her wings and flashing her feathers, Ari tries to restrain her again. "Just leave me alone, I don't want to hurt you," she says pushing him back. Ari wraps his arms around her from the side, pinning his arms against her sides. "Trust me" he says. She relaxes. He raises and arm and places his hand on her head. Her posture softens and she collapses into his embrace, half lying on him. She is still crying. Ari closes his eyes and concentrates. Her cries turn into sobs and eventually her eyes flutter and close as she drifts off to sleep. Ari lifts his hand off of her head, and fixes her hair, stroking the messy loose strands back into place. He looks up into the sky, he is in the middle of nowhere and he cant just leave her here. He lays her down in a more comfortable position and sits watching over her for a while. His head starts to spin again and his vision gets blurry. Eventually he too doses off one last time.Potentially one last quick dream sequence.Young Ari with his hand on a young girls head as she sobs gently. Then his dream fades to black and he enters deep sleep.12 - Dreams (Ari)
ChaptersLila slowly wakes up. Shes on the cold uneven ground. Her body aches. It feels heavy and sore, her feathers are matted and her face is puffy from crying. She has bruises and scrapes all over her body. For a moment she doesn't recognise where she is, its still slightly dark, dawn light filtering through the canopy.She hears someone breathing beside her. She looks up.Ari is asleep, half slumped against a tree.He looks exhausted, bruised from when she threw him, arms scraped from running through the forest, hair sticking everywhere.This is the moment she realises something quietly devastating: He stayed. Even after what I did.Fragments of memory slam into her all at once.Flashes of white light. Bones crunching against themselves. Muscles twisting and spasming. Wings snapping out, hitting trees. Her vision strobing with flashing feathers. The crushing pressure inside her skull like it was trying to split open. Her own screams, echoing in the dark.She remembers wanting it to stop. She remembers being sure she was going to kill someone.And then she remembers Ari. A memory of his hands pinning her arms. His voice telling her to trust him. His touch easing something inside her no one has ever been able to reach. She doesn’t understand how that’s possible.Her chest tightens.Lila processes what Ari did. This is where the seeds of deeper emotion start. She sees him differently now. Gentle instead of chaotic. Brave instead of reckless. Familiar instead of strangeAnd also: Why didn’t he run when I told him to? Why stay with a monster? Her self-hatred surfaces, but soft and confused, not dramatic. Maybe she picks a leaf out of his hair without waking him, then freezes like why did I just do that? - Very subtle affection, not overt romance.What is Ari? What does the agency want with them both?Lila checks over his injuries. She realises how much he pushed himself to reach her.“…thank you,” she whispers, barely audible.She tries to stand but her knees buckle immediately. A sharp ache shoots up her wings. She collapses back down beside him. For a moment, she leans against his shoulder. (Not intentionally intimate, just because shole needs something solid to keep herself upright.)Ari groans and Lila jerks away from him.He stirs, confused, eyes half-open. He rubs his eyes.“…Good morning,” she says quietly.Ari blinks at her, startled, almost like he wasn’t expecting to see her there.“Morning,” he mutters, stretching his back His spine clicks. “Ugh, what happened? I feel terrible.” (He doesn’t remember anything clearly when he uses his ability too much.)Lila hesitates.She watches him get up, heart thudding, wondering whether she should tell him everything… or keep the worst of it to herself. "Ari... How did you do that?""Do what?"He really doesn't remember."...never mind"Ari holds out his hand, offering to pull Lila up. She takes it and is pulled of the ground."Where are we?" Ari started walking off into the forest in a random direction.Suddenly Lila realises they don't know their way back.Maybe they are looking for the way out. Then realise they probably should have just stayed where they were, and realise they are probably deeper into the forest than before. Maybe they decided to stay in one spot. Clouds roll in and it starts to rain / or snow, figure out which makes more sense. They hide under a tree but describe the feeling of water drops dripping down from the tree, and the smell. Maybe some more dialogue. Set up their characters a bit more. Ari is crouched with his knees in his arms. Lila notices that Ari is shivering. She opens her wing and holds it over his head to shelter the rain like an umbrella or around him to keep him warm idk yet.13 - Lost (Lila)
ChaptersMaybe starts as they are looking for Ari and Lila. Actually no, they wake up and the others are missing. Dom wakes up Kai in a hurry. Yes, thats how it starts.Kai is tracking them cus shes good at that kind of thing. It kind of goes inside her head and how shes worrying about of they are ok. They find where Ari found Lila and theres feathers everywhere and broken branches and they think maybe they got attacked by a predator. Kai spots some footsteps leading into the forest in a different direction and they follow them. Goes into Kais head again shes super worries about Ari. Maybe describe how they met, maybe even have some kind of flashback but maybe not. They find Ari and Lila and are like "what happened to you two, you look like you just came back from war" (probs doesnt fit anymore)POV SWITCH TO LILAI want Kairu to run up and hug Ari and for Lila to feel jealous or smth from Lilas POV. Describe it as her heart beating faster and her chest feeling weird. She doesnt know why she feels that way. Chapter ends as Ari turns back to Lila and asks "you coming?" 14 - Search (Kai→Lila)
ChaptersThey want to try and get Lila's ship back because it has all her stuff and so they can leave the planet. Dom tracks the ship because he still has the tracker and it looks like they took it to a scrap yard just out of the city and they plan on recovering it. But Ari points out it could be a trap. They go anyway because of how important it is to Lila and its their best chance of leaving the planet. They scout it out but it seems safe. They sneak in but right as they are about to board the ship the agency comes out of hiding with guns and stuff and the kids hold up their arms.Dialogue between them, talking about if Ari and Lila turn themselves in they will let their friends go alive.As Lila holds her arms up, a small hatch opens up on her forearm and out shoots a small object up into the air. "What was that" shouts one of the guard's. It falls back down and as soon as it hits the ground the area is quickly engulfed in a cloud of smoke. There's shouting and coughing and stuff and the agents close in. They bump into each other without being able to see. The kids run onto the ship but a couple of agents follow them on board. Kai and Lila start fighting them but Lila gets shocked by like a taser or smth and collapses. "Ari get us out of here!" Shouts Kai, you wanna be a pilot right? "I've never actually flown!" Ari shouts back but he rushes to the cockpit. He sits in the control seat and looks over all of the controls. He knows a little from his time messing around in the abandoned shipyard. "Right, do this do that" idk he says random shit ill figure out exactly what he does later. The ship jolts and starts moving upwards. He can hear the sound of Kai still going at it down below. Dom closes the door. "Get us out of here!" Dom shouts. The ship wobbles around above the yard for a bit before Ari gets high enough to increase the throttle and they shoot off. "Where the hell am I going!" shouts Ari. 15 - Recovery (Ari)
Chapters Lila teaches Ari how to fly her ship16 - I want to be a pilot! (Lila)

item.title: Rex
item.description:
Infobox Production Information Character Information Physical Information Relationship Information Affiliations
Omega Tech
Original droid independence group
Dawn
Dawn Alpha-Crew He uses a revolver and sniper rifle BIRTHDAY: MONTH: 7 July DAY: 12

item.title: - Start Here -
item.description:
The Astraeus project is the general name for all worldbuilding that takes place within the Astraeus galaxy. This worldbuilding started out with the Omega Dawn project but I also started another project called The Proteus Project.
The Omega Dawn project originated as a video game I spent a few months developing. The game was to be a sci-fi action-adventure twin-stick shooter set in a dystopian post-war galaxy. While I am no longer developing the game, I am still in love with the world and the concept and am continuing to worldbuild and develop its characters and story. I even managed to link it to my previous worldbuilding project Lanoor.
K-07 — Eradicator Series Omega droid.
Rex — Rogue Series Omega Droid, Dawn operative.
Scout — Modified Surveillance Series Omega Droid, companion to Rex.
Hana Otharia — Human fighter, Dawn member, graffiti artist.
Character Index Nothing here yet :/ Main Conflict: Ethics of droid eradication vs. virus spread. Player / Reader Focus: Choice-driven missions, ethical dilemmas, multiple perspectives. Tone & Style: Dark, action-oriented, with character-driven narrative and moral tension.
Glossary
Reading Order
April's Timeline
Character Index

item.title: Omega Dawn
item.description: Nothing here yet :/

item.title: 1 - Droid (Ari)
item.description: ChaptersAri, Dom and Kai have an encounter with an infected droid while out scavenging. This sets up character dynamics before giving us the inciting incident. They get back to the camp and overhears Brax talking about his deal with the agency - the inciting incident.I remember this I think‌“Are you sure about this?” Domelo asked, adjusting his glasses as he stared at a bright red danger sign that hung from a chained-up mesh gate. It depicted a robotic figure standing in a pool of blood and bones.“Well… Jemi said it’s rare for droids to visit this area,” Ari said through the fence as he dropped to the ground on the other side, “so blame him if everything goes wrong.” He dusted his hands off. “Plus, we have Kai.”“That’s not reassuring,” Dom said.“Wow, thanks,” Kairu said sarcastically from the top of the fence.“No, not you, I mean we’re just going off something Jemi said? Of all people we’re trusting Jemi on this one?”Ari sighed. “The safe zone is basically empty at this point. Out here is a gold mine and we need to take advantage of it before everyone else beats us to it.” Ari reached to up help Kai.“Come on Dom, lets just get this over with. I don’t like this idea as much as you do, but when has Ari ever failed us?” Kai said as she planted her feet on the ground. “Well I have a list,” Dom said, “but it’s not Ari I’m worried about, its Jemi. How would Jemi of all people know this area’s safe?”“No idea, but let’s get a move on. The longer we hang around here the riskier it is.” Kai said.Dom clambered over the fence, less graceful than the two before him.
item.guid: Worldbuilding/Astraeus/_Storylines/The Proteus Project/Planning & Development/Ari Story/Chapters/1 - Droid (Ari).md

item.title: Domelo Marcell
item.description:
Infobox Biographical Information Character Information Physical Description Relationship Information Affiliations
Vost Scrapper Guild
Domelo Marcell, commonly known as Dom, was a scavenger for the Vost Scrapper Guild. He escaped the guild with his good friends Ari Lorano and Kairu Akuna after Ari stole an important item from the gang leader Brax Irvan. Dom is gay.

item.title: Zova
item.description: An apex predator native to Sovara. They are large feathered creatures with beaks. Their overall structure is similar to that of a big cat, giving them the nickname "Owl Cat" or "Owl Panther".They have accelerated healing abilities and can change the colour of their feathers monochromatically for camouflage against the different environments on Sovara such as snow or rock. They can also make their feathers glow, used for

item.title: Early Expansion
item.description: Nearby star systems colonised

item.title: Expansion Declared Over
item.description: The majority of the galaxy had been explored / settled in and space routes had been established. A new year system was established using the capital planet Acropolis as the default time system.

item.title: First Galactic War
item.description: War fighting over control of the Galactic Centre

item.title: Humanity Arrives
item.description: First colony system stabilises/established Mining, basic industry, and infrastructure

item.title: Galactic Divide
item.description: Separate major galactic political groups began forming in the galaxy

item.title: Morph War
item.description: Morph War

item.title: Omega Tech Founded
item.description: Omega Tech was founded in 1320 BE during the First Galactic War

item.title: Omega Tech Begins Droid Production
item.description: Omega Tech Begins Droid Production in response to the Second Galactic War.

item.title: The Great Race
item.description: Political race to reach the Galactic Centre.

item.title: Theta Virus
item.description: The Theta Virus 3329 AE

item.title: Athen
item.description: Athen was a Tactical Series droid who created the Aegis Antivirus. He was captured by Omega Tech and forced to develop the Aegis for their new Eradicator Series droids. He was a part of the Original droid independence group, and was

item.title: Brax Irvan

item.title: Krush
item.description: Former gang lord now owns a cutesy juice company called Krush Krush

Irvan

Original droid independence group

item.description:

Omega Tech
Original droid independence group
Dawn
Dawn Alpha-Crew

item.title: Acropean
item.description: Primarily human ethnicity originating from the Acropolis system

item.title: Demish
item.description: Main ethnicity of the planet Demeter.

item.title: Sovari
item.description: Primarily avian ethnicity originating from the planet Sovara

item.title: Nisoki
item.description: Primarily human ethnicity originating from the planet NisokaEthnicity: NisokiNationality: Nisokan

item.title: Avian
item.description: A near-human species. They have feathered wings.

item.title: Dawn Alpha-Crew
item.description: Alpha-Crew was the first official crew as part of the rebel group Dawn.

item.title: Dawn
item.description: A rebel group founded by Rex.

item.title: Eradicator Series
item.description: Droids developed during the Theta Virus outbreak to exterminate infected droids. They are equipped with the Aegis Antivirus which gives them immunity to the Theta Virus.

item.title: Combat Class
item.guid: Worldbuilding/Astraeus/Groups/Major Groups/Omega Tech/Droid Series/Droid Classes/Combat Class.md

item.title: Security Class
item.guid: Worldbuilding/Astraeus/Groups/Major Groups/Omega Tech/Droid Series/Droid Classes/Security Class.md

item.title: Service Class
item.guid: Worldbuilding/Astraeus/Groups/Major Groups/Omega Tech/Droid Series/Droid Classes/Service Class.md

item.title: Worker Class
item.guid: Worldbuilding/Astraeus/Groups/Major Groups/Omega Tech/Droid Series/Droid Classes/Worker Class.md

item.title: Omega Droid Naming System
item.description: Class - Series - Model - Generation - UnitExamplesK-07: Combat Class - Eradicator Series - Alpha Model - Gen I - Unit 07 Serial: OT-D-CKA1-07 Designation: K-07Three: Worker Class - Engineer Series - Utility Model - Gen III - Unit 3330 Serial: OT-D-WGU3-3330 Designation: G-3330R3ZØN8: Service Class - Assistance Series - Emotia Model - Gen VII - Unit 3082184 Serial: OT-D-SAE7-3082184 Designation: A-3082184Combat Class - Tactical Series - Tactician Model - Gen I - Unit 701 Serial: OT-D-CTT1-701 Designation: T-701Classes: Service - S Combat - C Security - X Worker - W
item.guid: Worldbuilding/Astraeus/Groups/Major Groups/Omega Tech/Omega Droid Naming System.md

item.title: Vost Scrapper Guild
item.description:
Scavengers are known as "scrappers"Vost
Brax Irvan

item.title: Timeline
item.description: The year system uses BE (Before Expansion Ended) and AE (After Expansion).

item.title: Hana's Spray Paint Can
item.description: Hana

item.title: Acropolis
item.description: Capital planet of the galaxy.

item.title: Demeter
item.description: Has forests and plains. Lots of farming plants and animals.

item.title: Pan
item.description: Jungle planet.

item.title: Sovara
item.description: Snowy planet home to many owl-like species such as the Zova. Also home to the Sovari people.

item.title: Soteria
item.description: Droid safe haven planet.

item.title: Krav Division
item.description: A division of the Vost Scrapper Guild operating out of Krav. Run by Brax Irvan.

item.title: Krav
item.description: Large city on Vost, one of the first cities to get infested with Infected Droids.

item.title: Vost Orphan Camps
item.description: Established by the Vost Militia across multiple cities, these camps provided orphaned children with basic shelter and sustenance. The children were later assigned scavenging work. These camps later evolved into the Vost Scrapper Guild

item.title: Vost
item.description: Vost is an industrial planet in the Vost System. The planet has a cold climate, with frequent snowfall. It's soil, primarily composed of dark grey volcanic ash, forms expansive deserts and pockets of frost-resistant vegetation. Following the Theta Virus outbreak, most settlements were evacuated and abandoned, with infected droids now inhabiting them. Vegetation has begun to encroach on these areas.

item.title: Ari and Lila planning
item.description: Ari and his friends discover Brax's deal with the agency They escape Lila arrives at Brax’s, looking for him after years of hunting him down Brax offers Lila the job When Lila leaves, the scientific agency arrives early They find out about Lila Brax realises he can earn double the money Lila returns with Ari Brax does give her the video, showing he still kept up his end of the bargain, even though hes setting her up The agency walks in Lila realsied she had been set up Brax was just doing buisness As they are being escorted away, Ari jumps into the shaft with Lila The agency fire after them and Lila gets hit Agency boss orders cease fire because they are being too reckless, preventing fatal shots Storage closet scene with wound - intimate Dom and Kai barge in They escape together in Ari's car, he thought it had been destroyed long ago when Brax found out about it but Brax actually kept it around Car chase scene with the agency on their tail They escape together Ari leaves with Lila to uncover the truth and Dom and Kai do smth else idk
item.guid: Worldbuilding/Astraeus/_Storylines/The Proteus Project/Planning & Development/Ari Story/Ari and Lila planning.md

item.title: 10 - Chase (Ari)
item.description: ChaptersThey escape together in Ari's car, he thought it had been destroyed long ago when Brax found out about it but Brax actually kept it around. Car chase scene with the agency on their tail. They manage to escape together.
item.guid: Worldbuilding/Astraeus/_Storylines/The Proteus Project/Planning & Development/Ari Story/Chapters/10 - Chase (Ari).md

item.title: 11 - Parents (Ari)
item.description: ChaptersAri wakes up in the middle of the night. Lila is gone. He finds her by the river watching the video of her parents. He approaches her and she is startled, shutting off the video. Ari asks who the people were and Lila shows him and explains what she knows about them. She also tells Ari about her abilities. Ari realises he might be from a similar experiment, he doesn't tell her about his healing powers just yet though, he doesn't mention it to Lila, he just thinks about it internally. She shows him her glowing ability and Ari is amazed. They sit in silence for a bit. At some point either here or earlier Ari throws a couple rocks into the water. Ari eventually falls asleep.
item.guid: Worldbuilding/Astraeus/_Storylines/The Proteus Project/Planning & Development/Ari Story/Chapters/11 - Parents (Ari).md

item.title: 12 - Dreams (Ari)
item.description: ChaptersAri has a dream about the lab when he was little. Ari wakes up and Lila is gone again. He's cold and goes back to the car. Lila isn't there either. The others are sound asleep by the fire. I like the idea of describing both Kai and Dom as they sleep or smth. Like how Kai is strong and brute but looks so innocent when she sleeps or something, and Dom is drooling or smth. Ari sits down by the fire and tries to fall asleep but he cant. He cant stop thinking about how he could be linked to Lila and what the agency wants with them both. He heads back to the river, standing up on a bank and looks across it into the forest. Then suddenly he hears a faint scream come from inside the forest. He stumbles down the bank and wades through the water, running into the forest in the direction he thinks the scream came from. He rushes through the forest and hears more screams getting louder. He trips on a root and blacks out.Another dream sequence of him as a toddler. He is trying to sleep in his bedroom but he can hear another kid crying and screaming from down the hall, echoing around the clinical interior.He wakes up with a headache, his head is spinning. But he can still hear crying and screaming. He gets up, he can see light flashing from between the trees. He rushes to the source. Lila is in a clearing rolling around on the ground, flying around, crashing into trees, screaming and crying in pain. Ari rushes to her and restrains her. She flings him off of her with immense strength and he rolls across the ground. He gets up and she's squatting on the ground with her head in her hands, crying. Ari gets up and rushes back to her asking what's wrong. She screams out "It' hurts." She pulls at her hair. She digs at the ground with her feet. Then she lets out another scream, spreading her wings and flashing her feathers, Ari tries to restrain her again. "Just leave me alone, I don't want to hurt you," she says pushing him back. Ari wraps his arms around her from the side, pinning his arms against her sides. "Trust me" he says. She relaxes. He raises and arm and places his hand on her head. Her posture softens and she collapses into his embrace, half lying on him. She is still crying. Ari closes his eyes and concentrates. Her cries turn into sobs and eventually her eyes flutter and close as she drifts off to sleep. Ari lifts his hand off of her head, and fixes her hair, stroking the messy loose strands back into place. He looks up into the sky, he is in the middle of nowhere and he cant just leave her here. He lays her down in a more comfortable position and sits watching over her for a while. His head starts to spin again and his vision gets blurry. Eventually he too doses off one last time.Potentially one last quick dream sequence.Young Ari with his hand on a young girls head as she sobs gently. Then his dream fades to black and he enters deep sleep.
item.guid: Worldbuilding/Astraeus/_Storylines/The Proteus Project/Planning & Development/Ari Story/Chapters/12 - Dreams (Ari).md

item.title: 13 - Lost (Lila)
item.description: ChaptersLila slowly wakes up. Shes on the cold uneven ground. Her body aches. It feels heavy and sore, her feathers are matted and her face is puffy from crying. She has bruises and scrapes all over her body. For a moment she doesn't recognise where she is, its still slightly dark, dawn light filtering through the canopy.She hears someone breathing beside her. She looks up.Ari is asleep, half slumped against a tree.He looks exhausted, bruised from when she threw him, arms scraped from running through the forest, hair sticking everywhere.This is the moment she realises something quietly devastating: He stayed. Even after what I did.Fragments of memory slam into her all at once.Flashes of white light. Bones crunching against themselves. Muscles twisting and spasming. Wings snapping out, hitting trees. Her vision strobing with flashing feathers. The crushing pressure inside her skull like it was trying to split open. Her own screams, echoing in the dark.She remembers wanting it to stop. She remembers being sure she was going to kill someone.And then she remembers Ari. A memory of his hands pinning her arms. His voice telling her to trust him. His touch easing something inside her no one has ever been able to reach. She doesn’t understand how that’s possible.Her chest tightens.Lila processes what Ari did. This is where the seeds of deeper emotion start. She sees him differently now. Gentle instead of chaotic. Brave instead of reckless. Familiar instead of strangeAnd also: Why didn’t he run when I told him to? Why stay with a monster? Her self-hatred surfaces, but soft and confused, not dramatic. Maybe she picks a leaf out of his hair without waking him, then freezes like why did I just do that? - Very subtle affection, not overt romance.What is Ari? What does the agency want with them both?Lila checks over his injuries. She realises how much he pushed himself to reach her.“…thank you,” she whispers, barely audible.She tries to stand but her knees buckle immediately. A sharp ache shoots up her wings. She collapses back down beside him. For a moment, she leans against his shoulder. (Not intentionally intimate, just because shole needs something solid to keep herself upright.)Ari groans and Lila jerks away from him.He stirs, confused, eyes half-open. He rubs his eyes.“…Good morning,” she says quietly.Ari blinks at her, startled, almost like he wasn’t expecting to see her there.“Morning,” he mutters, stretching his back His spine clicks. “Ugh, what happened? I feel terrible.” (He doesn’t remember anything clearly when he uses his ability too much.)Lila hesitates.She watches him get up, heart thudding, wondering whether she should tell him everything… or keep the worst of it to herself. "Ari... How did you do that?""Do what?"He really doesn't remember."...never mind"Ari holds out his hand, offering to pull Lila up. She takes it and is pulled of the ground."Where are we?" Ari started walking off into the forest in a random direction.Suddenly Lila realises they don't know their way back.Maybe they are looking for the way out. Then realise they probably should have just stayed where they were, and realise they are probably deeper into the forest than before. Maybe they decided to stay in one spot. Clouds roll in and it starts to rain / or snow, figure out which makes more sense. They hide under a tree but describe the feeling of water drops dripping down from the tree, and the smell. Maybe some more dialogue. Set up their characters a bit more. Ari is crouched with his knees in his arms. Lila notices that Ari is shivering. She opens her wing and holds it over his head to shelter the rain like an umbrella or around him to keep him warm idk yet.
item.guid: Worldbuilding/Astraeus/_Storylines/The Proteus Project/Planning & Development/Ari Story/Chapters/13 - Lost (Lila).md

item.title: 14 - Search (Kai→Lila)
item.description: ChaptersMaybe starts as they are looking for Ari and Lila. Actually no, they wake up and the others are missing. Dom wakes up Kai in a hurry. Yes, thats how it starts.Kai is tracking them cus shes good at that kind of thing. It kind of goes inside her head and how shes worrying about of they are ok. They find where Ari found Lila and theres feathers everywhere and broken branches and they think maybe they got attacked by a predator. Kai spots some footsteps leading into the forest in a different direction and they follow them. Goes into Kais head again shes super worries about Ari. Maybe describe how they met, maybe even have some kind of flashback but maybe not. They find Ari and Lila and are like "what happened to you two, you look like you just came back from war" (probs doesnt fit anymore)POV SWITCH TO LILAI want Kairu to run up and hug Ari and for Lila to feel jealous or smth from Lilas POV. Describe it as her heart beating faster and her chest feeling weird. She doesnt know why she feels that way. Chapter ends as Ari turns back to Lila and asks "you coming?"
item.guid: Worldbuilding/Astraeus/_Storylines/The Proteus Project/Planning & Development/Ari Story/Chapters/14 - Search (Kai→Lila).md

item.title: 15 - Recovery (Ari)
item.description: ChaptersThey want to try and get Lila's ship back because it has all her stuff and so they can leave the planet. Dom tracks the ship because he still has the tracker and it looks like they took it to a scrap yard just out of the city and they plan on recovering it. But Ari points out it could be a trap. They go anyway because of how important it is to Lila and its their best chance of leaving the planet. They scout it out but it seems safe. They sneak in but right as they are about to board the ship the agency comes out of hiding with guns and stuff and the kids hold up their arms.Dialogue between them, talking about if Ari and Lila turn themselves in they will let their friends go alive.As Lila holds her arms up, a small hatch opens up on her forearm and out shoots a small object up into the air. "What was that" shouts one of the guard's. It falls back down and as soon as it hits the ground the area is quickly engulfed in a cloud of smoke. There's shouting and coughing and stuff and the agents close in. They bump into each other without being able to see. The kids run onto the ship but a couple of agents follow them on board. Kai and Lila start fighting them but Lila gets shocked by like a taser or smth and collapses. "Ari get us out of here!" Shouts Kai, you wanna be a pilot right? "I've never actually flown!" Ari shouts back but he rushes to the cockpit. He sits in the control seat and looks over all of the controls. He knows a little from his time messing around in the abandoned shipyard. "Right, do this do that" idk he says random shit ill figure out exactly what he does later. The ship jolts and starts moving upwards. He can hear the sound of Kai still going at it down below. Dom closes the door. "Get us out of here!" Dom shouts. The ship wobbles around above the yard for a bit before Ari gets high enough to increase the throttle and they shoot off. "Where the hell am I going!" shouts Ari.
item.guid: Worldbuilding/Astraeus/_Storylines/The Proteus Project/Planning & Development/Ari Story/Chapters/15 - Recovery (Ari).md

item.title: 16 - I want to be a pilot! (Lila)
item.description: Chapters Lila teaches Ari how to fly her ship
item.guid: Worldbuilding/Astraeus/_Storylines/The Proteus Project/Planning & Development/Ari Story/Chapters/16 - I want to be a pilot! (Lila).md

item.title: 17 - Sovara (Ari)
item.description: Chapters They go to Sovara
item.guid: Worldbuilding/Astraeus/_Storylines/The Proteus Project/Planning & Development/Ari Story/Chapters/17 - Sovara (Ari).md

item.title: 2 - Family (Ari)
item.description: ChaptersAri and his friends make a plan to escape together. Ari asks his younger brother, Leo, if he wants to come along but Leo refuses, saying he likes his life as a scrapper for Brax. Shows family dynamics and stuff.
item.guid: Worldbuilding/Astraeus/_Storylines/The Proteus Project/Planning & Development/Ari Story/Chapters/2 - Family (Ari).md

item.title: 3 - Huntress (Lila)
item.description: ChaptersLila is searching for Brax. Maybe she's in the middle of a bounty job, or she has just finished one. She talks with a guy who gives her info about Brax.
item.guid: Worldbuilding/Astraeus/_Storylines/The Proteus Project/Planning & Development/Ari Story/Chapters/3 - Huntress (Lila).md

item.title: 4 - Escape (Ari)
item.description: ChaptersAri and his friends steal a speeder/car and escape the city. They reach another city in the evening and find a place to camp. Dom and Kai plan to scavenge in the morning.
item.guid: Worldbuilding/Astraeus/_Storylines/The Proteus Project/Planning & Development/Ari Story/Chapters/4 - Escape (Ari).md

item.title: 5 - Deal (Lila→Brax)
item.description: Chapters(Could potentially be squeezed in at the end of chapter 4)Lila arrives at Brax’s and Brax offers her the job to find Ari. Short POV of Brax at the end:The the scientific agency arrives early. They find out about Lila and Brax realises he can earn double the money by handing in Lila as well.
item.guid: Worldbuilding/Astraeus/_Storylines/The Proteus Project/Planning & Development/Ari Story/Chapters/5 - Deal (Lila→Brax).md

item.title: 6 - Attack (Ari→Dom)
item.description: ChaptersAri wakes up, and Dom and Kai are already gone. When he's alone he gets attacked and captured by Lila. Quick POV switch to Dom. They are heading back to Ari and see Lila leaving with him. ^ Dom POV could be its own chapter with the start of chapter 7
item.guid: Worldbuilding/Astraeus/_Storylines/The Proteus Project/Planning & Development/Ari Story/Chapters/6 - Attack (Ari→Dom).md

item.title: 7 - Prisoner (Dom→Ari)
item.description: ChaptersDom and Kai run after Lila and confront her at her ship. She gets away but Dom manages to put a tracker on her ship. They follow her in the car they stole. POV SWITCH to Ari. Ari is in a cell in Lila's ship, he's sleepy from the sedative Lila gave him. He uses his healing powers to mostly heal the scars on his back from his fight with Lila. Our first look at his powers in use. Lila barges in and cuffs him. He is taken to Brax and it ends with Brax saying smth like. "Ari, welcome home."
item.guid: Worldbuilding/Astraeus/_Storylines/The Proteus Project/Planning & Development/Ari Story/Chapters/7 - Prisoner (Dom→Ari).md

item.title: 8 - Setup (Dom→Ari)
item.description: Chapters Dom and Kai track Lila's ship to the building they are in. They notice other ships pulling up from the scientific agency. POV SWITCH to Ari. Lila gets her reward, a holo-video of her parents. The agency shows up. Lila realises she had been set up.
item.guid: Worldbuilding/Astraeus/_Storylines/The Proteus Project/Planning & Development/Ari Story/Chapters/8 - Setup (Dom→Ari).md

item.title: 9 - The Agency (Ari)
item.description: ChaptersAs they are being escorted away, Ari jumps into the shaft with Lila. The agency fire after them and Lila gets hit. Agency boss orders cease fire because they are being too reckless, preventing fatal shots. Storage closet scene with wound - intimate. (some kinda thing where Ari heals Lila's side and her feathers are soft or smth "Feathers. Ari didn't know what he was expecting. They were short and soft, almost like fur") Dom and Kai barge in."Who are the fancy guys?"
item.guid: Worldbuilding/Astraeus/_Storylines/The Proteus Project/Planning & Development/Ari Story/Chapters/9 - The Agency (Ari).md

item.title: Ari Story Structure
item.description: Introduction to Ari’s inner conflict- What does Ari think will bring him true happiness or contentment? And how is his fear stopping him from going after it?Ari want's to leave the scrapper guild. He wants to be a pilot and see the galaxy. He believes freedom will bring him true happiness. He fears his uncle Brax.Also his friends are very important to him.He also wants to find out about his healing powers and why Brax is so insistent he keeps them a secret. Ari believes true happiness = freedom. Leaving the scrapper guild Becoming a pilot Seeing the galaxy beyond Brax’s control Living a life where he chooses his own path The fear stopping him: Brax’s abuse and control The belief that disobeying gets people killed (the misbelief) Fear of failing his friends Fear that leaving will harm the people he cares about or lead to tragedy like his parents’ deaths This makes Ari emotionally stuck: He wants the sky, but he's terrified he’ll destroy the people around him if he reaches for it.- What is Ari’s misbelief and what happened in his past to create this misbelief?His parents were killed by infected droids when he was young. Ari feels guilty for his parents' death. He believes that if he doesn't follow orders he can get people hurt. Misbelief:“If I disobey or act on my own, people die because of me.” Origin:When he was a child, he: acted impulsively, or broke formation, or ran toward something he shouldn’t have, or dragged his parents into danger → and infected droids killed them. Even if it wasn’t actually his fault, he believes it was. Brax weaponises this by constantly saying: “Your parents died because you didn’t listen.” “Look what happens when you don’t follow orders.” “You’re going to get your friends killed if you keep acting stupid.” Ari internalises: Obey = safe Disobey = death Which directly conflicts with: His desire for freedom His dreams His nature as a good person He also has memories of his time in the lab, being experimented on.- How can I show my audience in the FIRST FIVE MINUTES why “what’s happening” MATTERS to Ari, given his desire, fear, and misbelief?Ari's impulsiveness alerts a rouge infected droid while he and his friends are scavenging. Reminds him of how it got his parents killed. Action sequence. Shows Ari's relationship with the other characters, how they are important to him. 1. Show Ari’s dream in action or conversation (1–2 paragraphs) He stares up at a flight path and watches ships cross the sky Or he fiddles with a broken nav-console like he knows exactly how to fix it Or he tells Dom/Kai, jokingly but not really: “One day I’m getting off this rock.” 2. Show the misbelief in real time (scavenging begins) Ari gives strict warnings: “Stick close. Keep your comms open. Don’t wander.” He’s bossy because he’s anxious He’s anxious because he believes disobedience = death 3. Show the moment where his desire and misbelief clash Ari sees something cool—old ship parts, tech, something he always dreamed about.He impulsively steps toward it. Ari’s impulsiveness alerts a rogue infected droid. Instant cause → effect. 4. Show the trauma reactionWhen the droid wakes: He freezes He hears echoes of his parents screaming He flashes back to the night they died He panics and apologises out loud (“I’m sorry, I’m sorry—”) even though it’s irrational He pulls Dom/Kai back, putting them behind him His first instinct is to protect them, not himself 5. Show why this moment matters This proves to the audience: He wants freedom but thinks he doesn’t deserve it because he believes he’ll get people killed and this fear runs his entire life And now the droid he accidentally alerted threatens the people he loves most.This is emotionally and narratively perfect.PROTAGONIST IS PUSHED OUTSIDE COMFORT ZONE- Why does this inciting incident matter to my protagonist? How does it push him outside his comfort zone? Ari finds out he's being sold to an underground science agency and might never see his friends again.- What internal conflict is going to arise for my protagonist in wake of the inciting incident? He wants to stay with his friends He wants to get away from his scrapper life He doesn't want to go with the agency THE IMPOSSIBLE QUESTION - What is the “impossible choice”? Your protagonist must be faced with options: stay inside their comfort zone and risk NEVER getting What They Desire, or venture into the unknown and accomplish their goal while STILL avoiding their fear.The choice to escape with his friends and leave his life behind.OPPOSITION/ANTAGONISTIC FORCE LOOMS IN THE DISTANCE   - What is the opposition/antagonistic force my protagonist is going to have to face head-on later? How can I show the reader that it’s already looming in the distance?He will need to face the agency, the agency show up and he escapes with Lila.PROTAGONIST PURSUES THEIR FEAR-BASED GOALPROMPT:Ask yourself:- How is my protagonist going to execute their plan (achieve goal, avoid fear)?He wants to figure out why the agency is after him and Lila- What is their step-by-step plan for making this happen? (Even if they don’t know every step themselves).They travel back to Sovari where they both were born, for answers.- How can I show my reader the REASONING behind my protagonist’s actions (aka: how their every decision is fundamentally based on their misbelief)?IDK BRUHPLOT TWIST!- What unexpected thing is going to upend my protagonist’s plan (and entire life)?Ari finds out both himself and Lila were born as experiments. The agency worked semi-alongside the Sovari lab and Ari and Lila's parents. They discover the reason Ari and Lila are wanted by the agency.- Why does it matter to my protagonist, given their desire and fear?he wants to be free, he doesn't want to be stuck in a lab.- How is it going to change the game for my protagonist?he realises the power he hasPROTAGONIST APPROACHES THEIR GOAL FROM A DIFFERENT ANGLE- What is my protagonist’s NEW plan going to be, based on the game-changing midpoint and what it means to them?After learning he and Lila are experiments and the agency wants to exploit them, Ari’s goal shifts: it’s no longer just about escaping Brax or surviving in the short term. His new plan is to keep Lila safe, evade the agency, and find a way to uncover the truth about who they are and why they were made, while staying ahead of anyone trying to control them.- How does my protagonist think their new plan is going to actually work and bring them to their goal while STILL avoiding their fear?Ari believes the best way to avoid being captured is to stay mobile, rely on the loyalty of his friends, and keep the agency off-balance. He thinks that by acting quickly, making small but decisive moves, and staying close to Lila, he can protect both of them without directly confronting the agency head-on—avoiding immediate danger while buying time to figure out a bigger solution.OPPOSITION/ANTAGONISTIC FORCE GETS CLOSER   - How can I show the opposition/antagonistic force now getting closer to disrupting the protagonist’s life? The agency closing in on Ari and friends. Ari realises staying hidden won’t protect them. Foreshadow that he may have to make a personal sacrifice. agency closing in aggressively, they are omnipresent and smarter than Ari expected. Ari’s friends are **directly threatened, maybe Dom or Kai gets cornered. Ari realises hiding or running isn’t enough; he can’t just avoid danger. Raise emotional stakes: his fear of losing people he cares about intensifies, making him question his ability to protect anyone. Could include a smaller betrayal or misstep that shows his misbelief (“if I don’t obey or plan perfectly, people get hurt”) still influences him. PROTAGONIST THINKS THEY HAVE OVERCOMEPROMPT:Ask yourself:- Why does my protagonist think they will be victorious?He outsmarts the agency.- What’s happening to make them feel SO CLOSE to achieving their goal and finding happiness at last?idk Ari thinks he’s finally outsmarted the agency, maybe by creating a temporary safe route, distracting them,. The victory is partial, showing competence and courage, giving him hope. But it sets up overconfidence, making him underestimate the agency’s resources or foresight. Could include a small “proof” that his powers or plan are working, like using his healing or clever planning to save someone. This is the calm before the storm — he feels close to success, but the disaster is looming. Successful Escape / Diversion: Ari uses his clever planning to get Lila or friends out of immediate danger. Maybe he creates a diversion, tricks the agency briefly, or rescues someone. Feels like a win, but the agency still has resources and knowledge, so the threat isn’t gone. EVERYTHING GOES WRONGRight when they think they've made it out Dom and Kai get captured. What does this disaster specifically mean to my protagonist? His friends are important to him. How does it force them to realize that they’re the one to blame for this crisis? Somehow his impulsiveness caused this - How does it completely disarm them and make them face off with their fear and misbelief?They realise that he is the one they want, him being with them is putting them in danger. Dom and Kai get captured just when Ari thinks they’re safe. Ari realises his impulsiveness led to this crisis. He feels guilt and responsibility, believing he’s the danger to everyone he cares about. PROTAGONIST IS HOPELESS- How is my protagonist forced into the ring with their kryptonite?He decides to turn himself in to protect his friends, Lila decides to go with him, so he wont face it alone.Inspired by when Omega gets captured in The Bad Batch.Ari and Lila live out their days in the facility, big time skip, a few months go by. Ari decides to turn himself in to protect his friends. Lila chooses to go with him, so he’s not alone. He faces his kryptonite: being in the agency’s hands and powerless. Time skip: Ari and Lila spend months in captivity, feeling trapped and hopeless. The facility has more of the beasts that Brax cared for years ago.Ari has bonded with one of them in secret and can somewhat communicate with it.RENEWED HOPEAri's friends find a way to break into the facility and rescue him and Lila.- How is my protagonist going to overcome their fear and continue to the climax, therefore developing as a character?while he thought complying was the only way to keep his friends safe, he realises they still love him and will help him even if it means putting themselves in danger, they will share Ari's burden and Ari doesn't have to take it on alone.- What lesson are they going to learn (and simultaneously teach the audience?)that friendship is powerful yayyy Dom and Kai break into the facility to rescue Ari and Lila. Ari realises he doesn’t have to bear responsibility alone; his friends will share the burden. Lesson/Theme: friendship and trust are powerful, and courage can be shared. PROTAGONIST FACES THEIR BIGGEST CHALLENGE YET- How does my protagonist prove their transformation by crushing their misbelief and facing their greatest fear with courage?idk somehow in the escape he chooses to follow his on beliefs rather than orders, he escapes with his friends While they are escaping everyone gets caught except for Ari. He's given the option to turn himself in and his friends are set free, or if he leaves his friends will be killed.Obviously the only reasonable option is to turn himself in, but he pretends to, and right at the right moment he does something to destroy the lab and escape with friends, destroying of lab maybe smth hes been working on in secret all these months idk how Everyone else is captured except Ari. Ari is given a choice: turn himself in and save friends or leave and risk their deaths. He pretends to comply but secretly has a plan he’s been preparing for months. He destroys the lab/facility with the help of the beast, the same way Brax did so many years later, but this time it didn't kill anyone important, escaping with his friends. Proves he can trust his instincts and take action without blindly following orders. Shows courage and leadership, crushing his misbelief that “if I disobey, people will get hurt.” PROTAGONIST OVERCOMESThis doesn’t necessarily mean the protagonist wins the external battle or that things turn out exactly how they hoped. But the protagonist does experience a personal victory — because they overcame their fear and destroyed their misbelief. Here’s my rule of thumb: if your reader doesn’t know how the character has transformed as a result of their journey, you need to rewrite your book until they do.- How has my protagonist changed as a result of their journey?He isnt as quick to comply with peoples orders, he does want is best for both him and his friends.WRAPPING UP LOOSE ENDS- Where will my protagonist go from here?Maybe he goes back and frees the scrappers, or just his brother.- What does their life look like, now that they have overcome their misbelief?The agency is no longer after them, he has no overarching figures.possible hint at romance between Ari and Lila, or a full on confession if I decide to drop hints throughout the book instead
item.guid: Worldbuilding/Astraeus/_Storylines/The Proteus Project/Planning & Development/Ari Story/Ari Story Structure.md

item.title: Lilas Ship planning
item.description: They were gonna escape via Lila's ship but it was heavily guarded so they escaped by car instead.
item.guid: Worldbuilding/Astraeus/_Storylines/The Proteus Project/Planning & Development/Ari Story/Lilas Ship planning.md

item.title: Random Idea Dump
item.description: Ari and Lila are lost in the forest. They call out to Dom and Kai but there is no response. They head into the forest in the direction they believe the camp is.
item.guid: Worldbuilding/Astraeus/_Storylines/The Proteus Project/Planning & Development/Ari Story/Random Idea Dump.md

item.title: The story arcs
item.description: Escape the guild The agency The forest Into space Sovari / The lab Answers The agency close in / victory Disaster The facility/ time skip Victory / ending
item.guid: Worldbuilding/Astraeus/_Storylines/The Proteus Project/Planning & Development/Ari Story/The story arcs.md

item.title: Dawnrunner
item.description: A game about breaking into government/Omega Tech facilities, escaping authorities and stealing/sabotaging plans. It incorporates parkour and third person combat. You can also use spray paint to make their facilities a little more colourful.

item.title: Aegis Antivirus
item.description: An antivirus to the Theta Virus created by Athen. Implemented in the Eradicator Series droids.

item.title: Proteus Project
item.description: The Proteus Project was a government-run genetic research initiative focused on human modification. Publicly, the project was presented as an effort to improve humanity through genetic enhancement, with stated goals including the elimination of hereditary diseases and the improvement of overall human health. In practice, the project conducted extensive experimentation aimed at creating enhanced individuals with traits suitable for military use, effectively functioning as a super-soldier programme under the guise of medical advancement.
